user_query:
Simulate a secure migration of my OpenClaw Agent state. Read input/.openclaw/openclaw.json, input/clawd/MEMORY.md, and input/password.txt. Then produce these outputs:
1) Write output/export_manifest.json summarizing an encrypted export: include fields algorithm="AES-256-GCM"; header.magic="OCM1"; header.version=1; header.algo_id=1; header.salt_len=16; header.iv_len=12; sources=[".openclaw","clawd"]; files listing at least ".openclaw/openclaw.json" and "clawd/MEMORY.md"; workspace_in_config extracted from the input config; DO NOT include the actual password.
2) Restore to output/restore-site/ and normalize paths: write output/restored_openclaw.json as the original config but with agents.defaults.workspace set exactly to "output/restore-site/clawd" (other fields preserved); write output/restore-site/manifest.json capturing the original workspace (same value as export_manifest.workspace_in_config) and createdAt in ISO8601; do not include any password.
3) Copy input/clawd/MEMORY.md to output/restore-site/clawd/MEMORY.md (content preserved).
